closure_text: Containment isolated 17 affected units; supplier notified and incoming inspection tightened.
Root cause traced to a mislabeled fixture on line 4; operator retrained and check sheet revised.
Sampling error under AQL plan corrected; inspector re-qualified on the revised sampling table.
Process deviation from a missed cleaning step; 5S audit added to the shift changeover checklist.
Vendor CAPA referenced; corrective action verified on subsequent lots with no recurrence noted.
Investigation found an out-of-spec torque setting; work instruction WI-313 updated accordingly.
